{{CargoRelic
|name=Minie Ball
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=10-30
|source=[[Koryeon Domain]], Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wish (1.2%)
|description=On Oct 30, 1849, Minie invented a special bullet which had a great impact on future generations.

The Minie ball has a small diameter that is unsuitable for ordinary rifled guns. With a lead skirting on the exterior of the bullet and a hollow cavity, the skirt of the bullet would expand under the pressure of gunpowder deflagration, allowing the bullet to gain a strong rotational force. During the Franco-Prussian War, the old Minie rifle suffered a heavy defeat on the battlefield and became obsolete.
|fame=46
|art=26
|fth=31
|civ=19
|tech=32
|ss1=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +1% Demon Chests
|ss2=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +2% Demon Chests
|ss3=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +3% Demon Chests
|ss4=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +5% Demon Chests
|ss7=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +5% Demon Chests<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +5% Demon Chests (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill I.png|50px]] Place in Gene Sim Device: Snail RUSH +20
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Blue FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Daily Hitmen Demon Chest Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Hitman Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Tomb Figure Boost]]
